summary: Comprehensive testing of RBAC, User Management, Approvals, Duplicate Detection, and Dashboard Clickable Features completed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working.

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing (test_user_*, test_role_*, test_limited_*) - some deactivated, some active. Test client 'Test Client Multi-Appart' created with reference #006.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DJERBA CONSTRUCTION CRM with full RBAC system working. Key features: (1) RBAC with 3 roles: super_admin (level 3, all permissions), admin_limited (level 2, needs approval for sensitive actions), user (level 1, basic access). (2) User management at /admin with tabs for Users, Approvals, History. (3) Duplicate detection: POST /api/clients returns needs_confirmation if duplicate found, use force_create=true to bypass. (4) Auto-references: Clients get #001, #002, etc. (5) Multi-apartment: Clients can have multiple apartments via appartement_ids array. (6) Dashboard clickable: stat cards, bloc cards, status rows all navigate to filtered pages. (7) Sidebar has Administration and Clients en double links. Auth uses Bearer token from localStorage.
